title: Stone & Sky
description: Completely overhauled Terrain Generation with only Vanilla Blocks and FPS boosters! Iris included!
body:
**Stone & Sky**

Quick note to downloaders:
I wanted something fresh beyond standard Minecraft worlds, so I curated this modpack. It focuses on completely overhauling terrain generation using only vanilla blocks.

I recommend adding [Better Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-village/version/Tb6WBfbt)
 (Fabric 1.21.4) to your setup for improved villages! I can’t include it here due to its license.

🌍 **About this Modpack**

A complete terrain generation overhaul using only vanilla blocks

Built on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
 by robotkoer (BSD-3-Clause license)

Shader support included

Easy multiplayer with e4mc

👥 **Multiplayer**

You can share your world with friends easily:

Pause → Open to Internet

Copy the link from chat

Share it with anyone you want to play with

**Works on most online servers!**

👉 **Note:** Vanilla clients need Fabric Loader + Fabric API to join. It works best if both players use the same modpack for smooth performance.

📜 **Credits**

View the modpack version description for links to copyrighted content.
